Crime_Scene_Start.text: {showTextbox}{center}{color:lime}{blip:3}October 11, Time Unknown,{nl}Joypolis, Manager's Office

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: This is the manager's office where the murder took place, pal.{nl}They say this floor is usually pretty deserted.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (A locked-room murder in a deserted area, huh...)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (Like Edgeworth said,{nl}this is going to be a tough situation.)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (I should investigate thoroughly.)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: No fingerprints were detected on the murder weapon,{nl}the knife.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: The killer either wore gloves when they stabbed him,{nl}or wiped the fingerprints off afterwards.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: Any other wounds or bruises besides the neck?

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: There's a lump on the back of his head, pal.{nl}If you take off his bandana, you can see the swelling.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: Huh...? There's some yellow paint stuck to the bandana.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: You're right.{nl}There's a diamond-shaped mark left on it, too.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (Yellow paint and a diamond shape...)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (There's no doubt he was struck on the head while wearing the bandana.)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (Does that mean he resisted before being killed...?)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (No... the victim was put to sleep with sleeping pills.{nl}He shouldn't have been able to resist...)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (Then what in the world... does this mean...?)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (It's no good... Thinking about it isn't getting me anywhere.)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: There's a half-eaten fried food bento box and the manager's office master key left on the table.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: And there was only one spare for the master key,{nl}which the suspect had on him, pal.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: Apparently, the victim usually left the cleaning of the manager's office to the suspect.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (So the only two people who could unlock the manager's office were the victim and the suspect, huh.)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: And this is the half-eaten fried food bento, and...

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: Huh...? There's both soy sauce and Worcestershire sauce on this half-eaten fried food.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: That's *sauce*-picious, pal.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: Pfft...

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: What is it?

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: I just made a pun on 'suspicious' and 'sauce'!{nl}A joke was just born by accident.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: No, this isn't the time to be joking around...

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: Y-You're right, pal.{nl}Pfft...

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: O-Oh, no...{nl}Excuse me.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: Sleeping pills were detected in the soy sauce on the bento, pal.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: So the victim ate the bento and fell asleep right away...
"Half-Eaten Bento" added to the Court Record.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: This bento only comes with Worcestershire sauce.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: We already confirmed with the bento company that it doesn't come with soy sauce, pal.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (Which means the culprit prepared the soy sauce in advance...)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: I really like how these fine yellow diamonds are carved all over this thing.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: It's what they call decorative carving.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: Huh...? What's this?{nl}There are two scratches on the top of the doors.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: Yep.{nl}Those were already there when we arrived, pal.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (There's some kind of plastic fragment embedded in one of the scratches.)
"Wooden Cabinet" added to the Court Record.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: Have you checked inside the cabinet?

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: Not yet, pal.{nl}We can't get this dial-type padlock open.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (So it's the type of padlock where you line up a 4-digit number to open it, huh.)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (Should I try entering a number?)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (I feel like there's more I need to look into.{nl}I'll investigate a bit more and try entering it later.)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (It's a tall, narrow locker.)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: This locker in the manager's office was totally empty.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: If they were standing up,{nl}it's about the right size to fit one adult.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Start.text: Really, pal?{nl}I don't think I'd fit.

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: W-Well...{nl}I certainly don't think you would fit, Detective Gumshoe...

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (Alright, I guess that's about it for here.)

Crime_Scene_Start.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Start.text: (Once all the info is gathered, let's head to court.{nl}I'll reveal everything there!)
{setState:Crime_Scene_done,true}{hideTextbox}{stopBGM:true}{p:500}{hideCharacter}{fadeOutFg}{fadeBg:mayaMove}{playSound:jingle}{sectionEnd}{skip:0}
